evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Create metrics to gauge projects, data quality, and success
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Data quality and metrics-gauging language leans rigour with no explicit velocity/speed phrases present in the JD.
evidence.domain_risk: Develop KPIs and metrics correlating to on time delivery and inventory
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Semiconductor manufacturing operational KPIs (delivery, inventory) affect business decisions but no financial reporting or regulatory compliance language is present.
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: The role promotes a data-driven culture with established KPI/metrics practices, indicating a data function that exists and is being reinforced rather than newly founded.
evidence.jd_authorship: Manage and optimize data discovery and cleansing
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Some specific technical detail (NumPy, Perl, C/C++, semiconductor context) is mixed with generic boilerplate phrases ("translate business problems into projects and solutions", "promote a data driven culture").
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Provide quality data solutions that create business value
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: The JD frames the role generically around data quality and business value without naming a specific commercial, product, or finance function as primary audience.
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Promoting a data-driven culture is direction-setting, but most responsibilities (translate business problems, write/test solutions) are scoped execution work.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: The candidate is expected to use AI coding tools (Claude Code, Co-Pilot, Gemini) to accelerate their own work, making AI the candidate's tool.
evidence.testing_framing: Write, code, test, and analyze data solutions, applications and automation
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Testing appears in a general software-development sense alongside coding and analysis, without a distinct data-quality-ownership framing, placing it as tool_listed.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: The JD is framed entirely in delivery and capability terms with no risk or compliance register.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Collect, organize, automate and prepare data for analysis
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: The role mixes building new data analytics solutions with organizing and optimizing existing data discovery and cleansing processes.
